creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text:
Have you tested opengl?  What does glxinfo print?  I suspect you need the libglvnd packages.
I don't think you need to give libGLX_system.so.0 special treatment.  This was done for libGL and libEGL to deal with the conflict with nvidia-driver.
I think you forgot to update linux-c7-xorg-libs.
